task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "弹出文件选择窗口供用户选择MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "加载选中的MP3文件并解析其内容"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "显示音频文件的基础信息（时长、声道数、采样率等）"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "询问用户是否需要试听音频并播放音频"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "绘制音频波形图以可视化音频数据"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "检测音频中的静音段并输出结果"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "计算音频的平均音量并提供音量建议"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "将选中的音频文件转换为WAV格式以提高兼容性"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "基于静音检测算法分割音频为多个片段"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "逐句导出分割后的音频片段为独立文件"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "初始化语音识别引擎以准备逐句识别"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "对每个音频片段执行语音识别并提取文本内容"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "将识别结果保存为CSV文件"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "将识别结果保存为TXT文件"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "清理临时文件并输出最终结果目录"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "fileSelection"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "metadataExtraction"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "userPrompt"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "visualization"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "silenceDetection"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "volumeAnalysis"}, {"source": "Node1", "target": "Node8", "type": "formatConversion"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "audioSegmentation"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "segmentExport"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "recognitionInitialization"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "speechRecognition"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node13", "type": "csvExport"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node14", "type": "txtExport"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node15", "type": "cleanup"}, {"source": "Node14", "target": "Node15", "type": "cleanup"}]}
